Dashboard Screen

State Switcher

Header Bar

Global navigation: logo left, user avatar right, search in center. Breadcrumb below on nested pages.

Stats Row

Three summary cards: Total Items, Active Items, Pending Review. Each card shows count + 7-day delta badge.

Main Table

Paginated data table with sortable columns: Name, Status, Owner, Last Updated. Row click opens detail panel.

Rollout Notes

Desktop-web first. Mobile-web follows in sprint 2. ios-app and android-app are out of scope for this release.
